company: Open-source AI model startup Together AI
dealSummary: Open-source AI model startup Together AI secured an $800 million round led by Prosperity7 Ventures at an $8.3 billion valuation.
AI startup Aire is looking to raise $400 million, Sifted reported.

Beeline Medicines, a biopharma company developing treatments for lupus and other autoimmune conditions, raised a $126.3 million Series A extension from investors including Bain Capital, CPP Investments and Bristol Myers Squibb.
leadInvestors: Bain Capital, CPP Investments, Bristol Myers Squibb

dealSummary: San Francisco-based Twelve Labs, which develops AI tools to search and analyze video content, raised a $100 million Series B led by NEA and Naver Ventures.
Higharc, which specializes in AI for the construction supply chain, received a $95 million Series C led by Insight Partners.
AI deal workflow platform developer Aligned secured a $60 million Series B led by PeakSpan Capital.
Taxwire, the developer of a tax automation platform, raised $25 million in seed and Series A funding from investors including Headline Ventures, XYZ VC and Vinyl.
Prague-based AI trading research lab EquiLibre closed its Series A led by Creandum at a valuation of more than $500 million.
